title: Monday.com and Hubspot integration via Zapier
excerpt:
Hello, 
We are trying to build an integration from monday.com to Hubspot so that any new item (corresponding to a lead) created in monday.com gets pushed to Hubspot. I want to pull information such as Name, email, status…

posts.author: Shweta (Shweta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
We are trying to build an integration from monday.com to Hubspot so that any new item (corresponding to a lead) created in monday.com gets pushed to Hubspot. I want to pull information such as Name, email, status. How do I build this via Zapier?

Thanks!

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml:
You know about the integration that already exists within Monday.com right? I don’t use Hubspot but it looks powerful.

image2400×1190 179 KB

posts.author: adldarti (Adl Darti)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Shweta

Would you like to join our beta testing program and build workflows between Hubspot and Monday without a line of code ?

You get free access to our no-code automation platform and we get some feedback to improve user experience.

Let me know if you’re interested, here some infos : https://en.blendeez.io/lp-beta-test
